doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The document references a non-existent court case "Jones v. DeSantis" and contradicts Florida's actual legal position on felony voting rights and LFO requirements.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document references "Jones v. DeSantis" (a non-existent court case) and mischaracterizes Florida's actual Amendment 4 implementation; Florida's real 2023 interpretation narrowly defined "completion of sentence" to include LFOs, and there is no credible August 2025 memo from the Florida Department of State reversing this position.
